title: Denver Metro eTRAKiT Permit Scraper
description: Scrapes eTRAKiT permit portals for custom home builds and remodels. Parameterized by city — change baseUrl to run against any eTRAKiT instance.

baseUrl.title: Portal base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL of the eTRAKiT instance. Do not include trailing slash.

cityName.title: City name
cityName.description: Human-readable city name — written into every output record as source_city.

daysBack.title: Days back
daysBack.description: How many days back to look for issued permits.

minValuation.title: Minimum valuation ($)
minValuation.description: Skip permits with a declared valuation below this amount. Use 0 to disable.

permitTypeKeywords.title: Permit type keywords
permitTypeKeywords.description: Permit types to target. The scraper checks if the portal's permit type field contains any of these strings (case-insensitive).

maxPages.title: Max result pages
maxPages.description: Maximum number of search result pages to process. Use 0 for unlimited.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy settings. Leave as default for most runs.
